title: Community Workforce Development Program - Canada.ca
content:
## Community Workforce Development Program
From: Employment and Social Development Canada (ESDC)
The Community Workforce Development Program supports communities through workforce planning and skills training to meet local economic development needs.
Canada Retraining and Opportunities Initiative
The Canada Retraining and Opportunities Initiative, delivered through the Community Workforce Development Program, helps workers affected by a mass layoff that significantly impacts the community. The initiative complements existing federal, provincial, and territorial programs by providing additional support to help laid-off workers transition to new jobs.
Organizations can apply for funding to:
- bring together community-based organizations, employers, training providers and others to develop a community workforce plan that identifies impacted workers, local employers looking to hire, and skills required to meet demand;
- help workers develop the skills needed to transition to new jobs through training and work experiences, and
- support employers to fill jobs in demand.
